Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""import argparse""\)' 'tb.append\(""import os""\)' 'tb.append\(""import math""\)' 'tb.append\(""import glob""\)' 'tb.append\(""import time""\)' 'tb.append\(""import torch""\)' 'tb.append\(""import torch.nn as nn""\)' 'tb.append\(""import torch.nn.functional as F""\)' 'tb.append\(""from torch.optim import AdamW""\)' 'tb.append\(""from torch.optim.lr_scheduler import CosineAnnealingLR""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""# -- Model config --------------------------------------------------------------""\)' 'tb.append\(""CFG = dict\(""\)' 'tb.append\(""    vocab_size   = 32000,""\)' 'tb.append\(""    context_len  = 4096,""\)' 'tb.append\(""    dim          = 1024,""\)' 'tb.append\(""    n_layers     = 24,""\)' 'tb.append\(""    n_heads      = 16,""\)' 'tb.append\(""    n_kv_heads   = 4,""\)' 'tb.append\(""    ffn_hidden   = 4096,""\)' 'tb.append\(""    norm_eps     = 1e-5,""\)' 'tb.append\(""    rope_theta   = 10000,""\)' 'tb.append\(""\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""class RMSNorm\(nn.Module\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def __init__\(self, dim, eps=1e-5\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        super\(\).__init__\(\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.w   = nn.Parameter\(torch.ones\(dim\)\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.eps = eps""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def forward\(self, x\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        return x * torch.rsqrt\(x.pow\(2\).mean\(-1, keepdim=True\) + self.eps\) * self.w""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""def precompute_freqs\(dim, max_seq, theta=10000\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""    freqs = 1.0 / \(theta ** \(torch.arange\(0, dim, 2\).float\(\) / dim\)\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""    t     = torch.arange\(max_seq\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""    freqs = torch.outer\(t, freqs\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""    return torch.polar\(torch.ones_like\(freqs\), freqs\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""def apply_rope\(x, freqs_cis\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""    B, T, H, D = x.shape""\)' 'tb.append\(""    x_c = torch.view_as_complex\(x.float\(\).reshape\(B, T, H, D//2, 2\)\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""    x_r = torch.view_as_real\(x_c * freqs_cis[:T].unsqueeze\(0\).unsqueeze\(2\)\).flatten\(-2\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""    return x_r.type_as\(x\)""\)')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""class Attention\(nn.Module\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def __init__\(self, cfg\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        super\(\).__init__\(\)""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.n_heads    = cfg[{dq}n_heads{dq}]""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.n_kv_heads = cfg[{dq}n_kv_heads{dq}]""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.head_dim   = cfg[{dq}dim{dq}] // cfg[{dq}n_heads{dq}]""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.q_per_kv   = self.n_heads // self.n_kv_heads""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        dim    = cfg[{dq}dim{dq}]""\)' 'tb.append\(""        kv_dim = self.n_kv_heads * self.head_dim""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.wq = nn.Linear\(dim, self.n_heads * self.head_dim, bias=False\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.wk = nn.Linear\(dim, kv_dim, bias=False\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.wv = nn.Linear\(dim, kv_dim, bias=False\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.wo = nn.Linear\(self.n_heads * self.head_dim, dim, bias=False\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def forward\(self, x, freqs_cis, mask=None\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        B, T, D = x.shape""\)' 'tb.append\(""        hd = self.head_dim""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""        q = self.wq\(x\).view\(B, T, self.n_heads, hd\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        k = self.wk\(x\).view\(B, T, self.n_kv_heads, hd\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        v = self.wv\(x\).view\(B, T, self.n_kv_heads, hd\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""        q = apply_rope\(q, freqs_cis\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        k = apply_rope\(k, freqs_cis\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""        # Expand KV for GQA""\)' 'tb.append\(""        k = k.repeat_interleave\(self.q_per_kv, dim=2\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        v = v.repeat_interleave\(self.q_per_kv, dim=2\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""        q = q.transpose\(1, 2\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        k = k.transpose\(1, 2\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        v = v.transpose\(1, 2\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""        scale = hd ** -0.5""\)' 'tb.append\(""        scores = torch.matmul\(q, k.transpose\(-2, -1\)\) * scale""\)' 'tb.append\(""        if mask is not None:""\)' 'tb.append\(""            scores = scores + mask""\)' 'tb.append\(""        scores = F.softmax\(scores.float\(\), dim=-1\).type_as\(q\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        out = torch.matmul\(scores, v\).transpose\(1, 2\).contiguous\(\).view\(B, T, -1\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        return self.wo\(out\)""\)')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""class FFN\(nn.Module\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def __init__\(self, cfg\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        super\(\).__init__\(\)""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.w1 = nn.Linear\(cfg[{dq}dim{dq}], cfg[{dq}ffn_hidden{dq}], bias=False\)""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.w2 = nn.Linear\(cfg[{dq}ffn_hidden{dq}], cfg[{dq}dim{dq}], bias=False\)""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.w3 = nn.Linear\(cfg[{dq}dim{dq}], cfg[{dq}ffn_hidden{dq}], bias=False\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def forward\(self, x\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        return self.w2\(F.silu\(self.w1\(x\)\) * self.w3\(x\)\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""class TransformerBlock\(nn.Module\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def __init__\(self, cfg\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        super\(\).__init__\(\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.attn      = Attention\(cfg\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.ffn       = FFN\(cfg\)""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.attn_norm = RMSNorm\(cfg[{dq}dim{dq}], cfg[{dq}norm_eps{dq}]\)""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.ffn_norm  = RMSNorm\(cfg[{dq}dim{dq}], cfg[{dq}norm_eps{dq}]\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def forward\(self, x, freqs_cis, mask\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        x = x + self.attn\(self.attn_norm\(x\), freqs_cis, mask\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        x = x + self.ffn\(self.ffn_norm\(x\)\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        return x""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""class ThreataformLM\(nn.Module\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def __init__\(self, cfg\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        super\(\).__init__\(\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        self.cfg    = cfg""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.embed  = nn.Embedding\(cfg[{dq}vocab_size{dq}], cfg[{dq}dim{dq}]\)""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.layers = nn.ModuleList\([TransformerBlock\(cfg\) for _ in range\(cfg[{dq}n_layers{dq}]\)]\)""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.norm   = RMSNorm\(cfg[{dq}dim{dq}], cfg[{dq}norm_eps{dq}]\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        # Tied output projection""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        self.register_buffer\({dq}freqs_cis{dq},""\)' 'tb.append\(f""            precompute_freqs\(cfg[{dq}dim{dq}] // cfg[{dq}n_heads{dq}], cfg[{dq}context_len{dq}], cfg[{dq}rope_theta{dq}]\)\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def forward\(self, x\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        B, T = x.shape""\)' 'tb.append\(""        h    = self.embed\(x\)""\)' 'tb.append\(f""        mask = torch.full\(\(T, T\), float\({dq}-inf{dq}\), device=x.device\).triu\(1\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""        for layer in self.layers:""\)' 'tb.append\(""            h = layer\(h, self.freqs_cis, mask\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""        h   = self.norm\(h\)""\)' 'tb.append\(""        out = F.linear\(h, self.embed.weight\)  # tied LM head""\)' 'tb.append\(""        return out""\)' 'tb.append\(""""\)' 'tb.append\(""    def num_params\(self\):""\)' 'tb.append\(""        return sum\(p.numel\(\) for p in self.parameters\(\)\)""\)')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(f""    ckpt   = torch.load\(args.sft_ckpt, map_location={dq}cpu{dq}\)""\)' 'td.append\(f""    policy = ThreataformLM\(ckpt[{dq}config{dq}]\).to\(device\)""\)' 'td.append\(f""    policy.load_state_dict\(ckpt[{dq}model{dq}]\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(f""    ref = ThreataformLM\(ckpt[{dq}config{dq}]\).to\(device\)""\)' 'td.append\(f""    ref.load_state_dict\(ckpt[{dq}model{dq}]\)""\)' 'td.append\(""    ref.eval\(\)""\)' 'td.append\(""    for p in ref.parameters\(\): p.requires_grad_\(False\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(f""    pairs = [json.loads\(l\) for l in open\(args.data_file, encoding={dq}utf-8{dq}\)]""\)' 'td.append\(f""    print\(f{dq}Loaded {{len\(pairs\)}} preference pairs{dq}\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(""    opt = AdamW\(policy.parameters\(\), lr=args.lr, weight_decay=0.0\)""\)' 'td.append\(""    import random""\)' 'td.append\(""    t0 = time.time\(\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(""    for step in range\(1, args.steps + 1\):""\)' 'td.append\(""        p      = random.choice\(pairs\)""\)' 'td.append\(""        prefix = \(""\)' 'td.append\(f""            {dq}<|begin_of_text|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n{dq}""\)' 'td.append\(f""            f{dq}{{p[{q}instruction{q}]}}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n{dq}""\)' 'td.append\(""        \)""\)' 'td.append\(""        prefix_ids   = sp.EncodeAsIds\(prefix\)""\)' 'td.append\(f""        chosen_ids   = \(prefix_ids + sp.EncodeAsIds\(p[{dq}chosen{dq}]\)\)[:args.max_len]""\)' 'td.append\(f""        rejected_ids = \(prefix_ids + sp.EncodeAsIds\(p[{dq}rejected{dq}]\)\)[:args.max_len]""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(""        def seq_logprob\(mdl, ids\):""\)' 'td.append\(""            x = torch.tensor\(ids[:-1], dtype=torch.long, device=device\).unsqueeze\(0\)""\)' 'td.append\(""            y = torch.tensor\(ids[1:],  dtype=torch.long, device=device\)""\)' 'td.append\(""            logits = mdl\(x\).squeeze\(0\)""\)' 'td.append\(""            lp = F.log_softmax\(logits, dim=-1\)""\)' 'td.append\(""            return lp[range\(len\(y\)\), y].sum\(\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(""        policy.train\(\)""\)' 'td.append\(""        pi_cho  = seq_logprob\(policy, chosen_ids\)""\)' 'td.append\(""        pi_rej  = seq_logprob\(policy, rejected_ids\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(""        with torch.no_grad\(\):""\)' 'td.append\(""            ref_cho = seq_logprob\(ref, chosen_ids\)""\)' 'td.append\(""            ref_rej = seq_logprob\(ref, rejected_ids\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(""        log_ratio = \(pi_cho - ref_cho\) - \(pi_rej - ref_rej\)""\)' 'td.append\(""        loss      = -F.logsigmoid\(args.beta * log_ratio\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(""        opt.zero_grad\(\)""\)' 'td.append\(""        loss.backward\(\)""\)' 'td.append\(""        torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_\(policy.parameters\(\), 1.0\)""\)' 'td.append\(""        opt.step\(\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(""        if step % 100 == 0:""\)' 'td.append\(f""            print\(f{dq}step {{step:5d}}  loss {{loss.item\(\):.4f}}  {{time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}}s{dq}\)""\)' 'td.append\(""            t0 = time.time\(\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(f""    final = os.path.join\(args.out_dir, {dq}final.pt{dq}\)""\)' 'td.append\(f""    torch.save\({{dq}model{dq}: policy.state_dict\(\), {dq}config{dq}: ckpt[{dq}config{dq}]}}, final\)""\)' 'td.append\(f""    print\(f{dq}DPO complete -> {{final}}{dq}\)""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(""""\)' 'td.append\(f""if __name__ == {dq}__main__{dq}:""\)' 'td.append\(""    main\(\)""\)' 'write\(""train_dpo.py"", td\)')
